items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the conditional logic for follow-up questions based on answers is not directly supported by the provided evidence. The prior steps do not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of conditional logic in the intake form. Additionally, the previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1) was blocked due to insufficient evidence, indicating that the necessary information to assess this requirement is lacking.
